---
title: ""
output: 
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: lualatex
geometry: margin=1cm
header-includes:
- \usepackage{fontspec}
- \pagenumbering{gobble}
---
\setmainfont{Arial}
# Front material

You may include front material in this section. This material will only be on
the first page of the printout, not before every results table.

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis'}
# Definitions
`%>%` <- magrittr::`%>%`
`!!` <- rlang::`!!`
`:=` <- rlang::`:=`
escape <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x) || is.null(x)) return("")
  x <- gsub("\\\\", "\\\\textbackslash{}", x)  # backslash first
  x <- gsub("([{}$&#_%])", "\\\\\\1", x)       # { } $ & # _ %
  x <- gsub("\\^", "\\\\textasciicircum{}", x)
  x <- gsub("~", "\\\\textasciitilde{}", x)
  x
}

# Page title
cat(paste0("# ", cluster_cfg$name, ": Topline Report\n\n"))

# Print tables
for(i in 1:length(tables)){
  
  # Subheading
  if("title" %in% names(codebook)){
    cat(paste0(
      "## ",
      escape(codebook$title[i]),
      "\n\n"
    ))
  } else {
    cat(paste0(
      "## ",
      escape(codebook$QN[i]),
      "\n\n"
    ))
  }
  
  # Caption
  if("caption" %in% names(codebook)){
    cat(paste0(
      escape(codebook$caption[i]),
      "\n\n"
    ))
  }
  
  # Table
  tables[[i]] %>% 
    dplyr::mutate(
      dplyr::across(tidyselect::where(~is.double(.x) && max(.x <= 1, na.rm = T)), ~round(.x * 100, 2)),
      dplyr::across(tidyselect::where(~is.double(.x) && max(.x > 1, na.rm = T)), ~round(.x, 2)),
      dplyr::across(tidyselect::where(~is.numeric(.x)), ~ifelse(is.na(.x), ".", as.character(.x)))
    ) %>% 
    knitr::kable(align = c("l", rep("r", times = length(tables[[i]]) - 1))) %>% 
    kableExtra::column_spec(1, width = "6cm") %>% 
    print()
  cat("\n\n")
}
```
